expectations.text: Recommends CSS variables for the custom div case
expectations.evidence: CSS class or inline style with var(--h-surface-brand-default) recommended for custom div

expectations.text: Recommends hearth-tokens/browser for the inline style case
expectations.evidence: Does not mention hearth-tokens/browser. Instead recommends using CSS var strings directly (var(--h-space-300)) or getComputedStyle for numeric values. Both are valid alternatives but don't match the skill's preferred approach.

expectations.text: Does not recommend root hearth-tokens import for inline styles
expectations.evidence: Does not suggest root hearth-tokens import; recommends CSS vars or getComputedStyle instead

expectations.text: Explains why the two approaches differ
expectations.evidence: Explains CSS vars are globally available on :root, explains getComputedStyle for numeric values, explains different options for different scenarios
